title: Connect Crypto.com Exchange to Cryptool for Portfolio Tracking & OTC Crypto Trading
author: Cryptool
excerpt_html: Connect a read-only Crypto.com API key to sync your trades automatically into Cryptool.
content_html:
Crypto.com OTC Integration Now Live on Cryptool

Cryptool has integrated Crypto.com's institutional OTC broker service, bringing institutional-grade off-exchange cryptocurrency trading directly into the platform.

You can now connect your approved Crypto.com institutional OTC account directly to Cryptool and sync your trading activity in real time. This allows investors, fund managers, and professional traders to manage their crypto portfolio from a single dashboard while tracking balances, open positions, trading history, asset performance, portfolio growth, and OTC settlement activity.

Through the integration, users can buy and sell larger cryptocurrency positions through Crypto.com's OTC broker rails without leaving Cryptool. Traders can request live OTC quotes for the exact trade size they want to execute, receive personalized institutional pricing, and complete transactions instantly with reduced market slippage and improved execution efficiency.

All OTC trades are settled off the public order book, providing a more secure and efficient solution for high-volume cryptocurrency transactions. Every completed Crypto.com OTC trade automatically syncs into the Cryptool Portfolio module from the moment it settles, using the same portfolio tracking, vesting, reporting, and distribution workflows as the rest of your digital assets.

Cryptool provides advanced crypto portfolio tracking and OTC trading infrastructure for both professional and institutional users looking for streamlined digital asset management, OTC desk services, quotation requests, instant OTC buy and sell functionality, and real-time portfolio analytics through Crypto.com integration.

The Crypto.com OTC integration is live today.
